titleStmt.title: SII 31.122: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 122. (A.R. No. B 276 of 1936.) TUMMALAPEṆṬA, KOYILAKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: A mutilated slab lying in front of the Āñjanēya temple.
This inscription is dated in Śaka [1480], Pingaḷa, Phālguṇa, śu. 11, corresponding to February 28, Monday, 1558 A.D.

Registers the remission of certain taxes like kāparala paṁnnu, Kāni[ke*] Dommari paṁnu, Siddhāyamu and Veṭivēmulu to the barbers (mangaḷavōjulu) situated in Tummalapeṇṭa village in Avukasīma as in the case of the gift given to Komḍoju by Sadāśivadēva mahārāya, by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja Tirumalarājayya dēvamahārāja to Timmoju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1480nēṭipiṁggaḷa saṁvatsara phālguṇa śu 11 lu
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivarāya
gāru vijayanagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārū
pridhivisāṁmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra rāmarāju tirumalarājayyadēvamahārājalugāru Avuku
maṁgaḷavōjulaku yiccina dha¨rmmaśāsana kramameṭlannanu śrīsa
dāśinadēvamahārāyalugāru vijayanagaramaṁdu maṁgaḷa koṁḍōju
ku hāsanānaku cacellēśīmanellānu maṁgaḷavōjarikela kāpara(la)paṁnnu kāni
vacaṁ doṁmaripaṁnu śidhāyaṁ veṭivēmulu sa¨rvvamānyaṁlu
gānu dha[¨rma]śāsanaṁ yica(ci)naprakāraṁ māku Avukuśīmalōnu tuṁmmala ve
tiṁyōjuku yicina śāsanaṁ paṁnnukānike veṭivēmulu doṁmma
ripaṁnnulusaha sa¨rvvamānyaṁgānu Istimi Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāyigānu
yistimi (yiṁduku) yiṁduku nāsu tamatalitaṁḍṟlaku
kōśisa pāpanaṁbōduru gaṁgātīramaṁdu pisa pāpānabōduru
māmu(ṁ)samu śēviṁcina pāpāna bōduru .
Digital edition of SII 31.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
